_comment: Archetype classifier config. Copy to config.json and edit paths. Override the location with the ARCHETYPE_CONFIG_PATH env var.
_python_executable: Interpreter of the dedicated conda env that has torch+transformers+safetensors. Falls back to sys.executable in environments where dependencies are installed (like Docker).
_script_path: Path to classify_retrieved_papers.py. Relative paths resolve relative to the workspace/project root.
_checkpoint_dir: Fine-tuned checkpoint dir. Relative paths resolve relative to the workspace/project root.
_label_mapping_path: label_mapping.json path. Relative paths resolve relative to the workspace/project root.
_encoder_config: Static BERT/SciBERT architecture used to rebuild the encoder offline (weights come from the checkpoint).
